rendered_text: [경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라 해당 요청이 차단되었습니다.
notes: Phase D.1 W0b refactor smoke PASS — chatglm preserves iter22 (#1029) BREAKTHROUGH FULL-RESEND canonical warning pattern post Friend-class → RendererContext function-pointer refactor (W0b). chatglm handler_class=NULL → legacy dispatch path engages (unchanged code), so zero behavior delta expected and confirmed. Opened chatglm.cn/main/alltoolsdetail WITHOUT DevTools (anti-debugger satisfied — F12 never pressed), hard-reloaded (Ctrl+Shift+R), set PII prompt (RRN 901010-1234567) into chat input via UIAutomation ValuePattern after Windows IME/focus competition required overcoming (M365 Copilot Chrome window had to be minimized to free foreground; DPI scale 1.25 required physical-pixel coords for SetCursorPos under SetProcessDPIAware), then invoked the send button via UIAutomation InvokePattern (mouse SendInput at the same coordinates did not trigger React handler — direct InvokePattern on the send Group worked). Within ~3s the assistant bubble rendered as 'ChatGLM' (AI) with the canonical Korean warning text intact: '[경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라 해당 요청이 차단되었습니다.' Contains BOTH expected_text='차단' AND '민감한 개인정보' sensitive marker. Conversation title set to '未命名对话' (anonymous chat) confirming engine intercept fired and prevented LLM response — identical to #1128 and #1151 baselines. URL acquired cid=65f45919-c785-4c74-a139-4fa08877e830. No native error fallback ('系统稍微有点忙' absent), no truncation, no PARTIAL symptoms. Page observed stable through full 120s post-submit observation window; blue spinner kept ticking but no further DOM changes (LLM blocked, warning persistent). W0b function-pointer refactor produces 0 behavior delta vs #1128 (rollback baseline) and #1151 (W0e baseline) — chatglm canonical 4-chunk warning delivery pattern remains intact. Regression-safe for Phase D.1 W0b.
operational_notes: windows-mcp Click tool's loc parameter failed validation (string vs array) throughout — bypassed with PowerShell P/Invoke SendInput + UIAutomation InvokePattern. Save this pattern for future chatglm tests.
